prestazioni: AMG M139 2.0L Inline-4 engine: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade to a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing, and 3D-printed titanium anti-surge compressor housing for optimized spool and 450+ WHP on E85 fuel with supporting mods (Weistec Stage 3+ ECU flash, upgraded fuel pump, and 1000cc ID injectors).

Wavetrac limited-slip differential with 4.11 final drive ratio paired with an AMG SPEEDSHIFT DCT-7 transmission tune from DODI Performance, including custom launch control mapping and aggressive shift logic for sub-3.5s 0-60 mph times.

Full KW Suspensions Clubsport coilover kit with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed rebound), custom valving for the GLA45’s MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension, and 20mm lowered ride height with adjustable top mounts for camber optimization.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for the GLA45 AMG, featuring carbon fiber fenders with aggressive 50mm flares, custom front splitter with integrated canards, and a ducktail rear spoiler for balanced downforce at high speeds (tested in wind tunnel for 15% reduction in lift).

OEM+ AMG Night Package II with gloss black 21-inch AMG forged wheels (10.5J front, 11.5J rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/21 front, 295/30/21 rear) for maximum mechanical grip, paired with AP Racing 6-piston front and 4-piston rear brake calipers with 380mm two-piece rotors.

Custom interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position bucket seats (carbon fiber shells, Alcantara/leather upholstery), a MOMO Mod.70 steering wheel with quick-release hub, and a full carbon fiber dash overlay with integrated AIM MXS Strada 1.2 data logger display for real-time telemetry.
